title: DriedFlower
description: DriedFlower is a slow-burn NeoForge magic-tech themed modpack, that sets in the Wastelands. The player's main goal is to create a portal to the Overworld.
body:
![DriedFlower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Jvvo5y1P/images/61c322eb99820123517f64864dfd30c072e00d14.jpeg)

![Modpack Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30e63a678c8d0e8cc15ec3e94bbd9155b0070d1b.png)
- Instead of Overworld, Player starts in Wastelands
- More challenging survival
- Optional quests that are more like a guidebook
- Many new recipes
- Custom items and blocks

![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/520871443c23f51a40b4db50fd4facbe2642535a.png)
### Mods
- #### [Born In Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
